summary: Sprint 4 passes all 8 required criteria. Typecheck/build/full suite (2338 tests) green; all 8 numeric primitives independently verified correct; dedup returns new-row count only; cross-unit refusal distinguishable from empty-window abstain; no dynamic execution confirmed by grep + genuine guard test. Design deviation (3 tables vs 'single generic events table' wording) accepted — no criterion mandates single-table. One low-priority finding: readFileSync in numerics.test.ts (carry-forward cleanup to S6).
